---
title: "Exploratory"
output: html_document
---
<!--- Set up --->
```{r set-up, include=FALSE}
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(kableExtra)
theme_set(theme_classic())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE, warning = FALSE
)
```

Reusable resources, templates, and workflows.
Things you reach for repeatedly.

## Writing

- Quarto manuscript template
- STROBE checklist
- Reviewer response template

## Analysis

- R project setup (renv, here, targets)
- Standard model evaluation pipeline
- Forecast scoring workflow

## Communication

- Slide deck template
- Workshop planning checklist
- Email templates (speaker invitations, collaboration requests)

## Admin

- LSHTM catering / room booking process
- Ethics application workflow
- Grant application timeline template
